summary: PR #80473 is a narrow, useful contributor fix for issue #80428, but it is not merge-ready in this plan run because live preflight shows check-lint failing, mergeability unknown, and the ClawSweeper review still calls out a dirty/conflicting branch plus missing rerun proof after refresh. Recommend repairing the contributor branch, preserving KhanCold's credit, then rerunning focused validation before any merge recommendation.

actions.reason: Useful narrow contributor PR, but merge is blocked by failed lint, unknown mergeability, and incomplete merge preflight. Because fix and raise_pr are allowed and maintainer_can_modify is true, the executable path is to repair the contributor branch rather than replace it.
The issue remains the canonical report for the lint failure while PR #80473 is repaired; no closure action is allowed or safe before the fix lands.
Create an executable repair plan for the applicator to refresh and validate the existing contributor branch while preserving attribution.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #80473 so it can land as the narrow fix for #80428. Refresh KhanCold's branch onto current main, resolve any native-command-route.ts conflict without broadening scope, keep the explicit non-any route/readiness result types, and rerun targeted lint/type validation before reconsidering merge.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(discord): resolve redundant type constituents in native-command-route
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs contributor PR #80473 for #80428 by refreshing the narrow Discord native-command-route typing fix onto current main and rerunning validation.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80473
Canonical issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/80428
Credit: original fix by @KhanCold.

Validation to include:
- pnpm exec oxlint extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts
- pnpm check

No changelog entry expected because this is a lint/type hygiene fix with no user-facing behavior change.
credit_notes: Credit KhanCold as the source PR author for #80473.
Preserve attribution to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80473 in any replacement or repair PR body if the contributor branch cannot be updated directly.
